prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 144 位持续上升至 2026 年第 87 位，近年排名大幅跃升，学校综合实力和认可度明显提升，对考生吸引力增强；2023 年曾因教师核酸检测事件出现偏负面舆情，2024 年声誉转为中性/混合（分数线持续上涨引发关注）；抖音热度为较热（总排名第 32），短视频曝光量较高，报考关注度处于中等偏上水平；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中暂无 A- 及以上等级学科数据，学校以农林、海洋、法学等为特色，整体学科实力处于稳步提升阶段。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科 专业社会热度持续偏高，与海南大学物理类招生专业高度重合，有利于吸引高分考生；河南省 2026 年高考总人数约 120 万（较 2025 年约 90.7 万大幅增加），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；海南大学位于海南省海口市，对河南考生属于跨省报考，地域偏好上南 方沿海城市吸引力较强；该校在河南招生规模较大（物理类 500+ 人），属于该校省外主要生源地之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026 年计划小幅扩招（+4.1%）、软科排名持续大幅上升（144→87）带来的吸引力增强、以及河南省考生规模显著扩大（约 120 万）等因素，扩招对位次有后推作用，但学校排名上升和考生增加对位次有前推作用，两者相互对冲后预计竞争略有加剧。预测最低位次约 57813 名，区间 57313–58313 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 34265 → 75105 → 43114 → 38682 → 56625. In 2022, due to [reason omitted], rankings rebounded significantly in 2023–2024, then shifted back to about 56625 in 2025. Over the past 3 years, the overall trend shows a fluctuating backward shift, with a baseline of about 56625 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Henan Province was 360 in 2021, 379 in 2022, 426 in 2023, 452 in 2024, and 514 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 535, an increase of about 4.1% from 2025, and the expansion trend has a backward-pushing effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, with a significant leap in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition, increasing its appeal to candidates. In 2023, there was a negative public opinion incident related to teacher nucleic acid testing, but in 2024, the reputation turned neutral/mixed (rising admission scores attracted attention). Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall rank 32), with high short video exposure, and application attention is at a medium-to-high level. No obvious record of admission gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there is no data on disciplines at A- level or above. The university is characterized by agriculture, forestry, oceanography, law, etc., with overall discipline strength steadily improving.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have consistently high social popularity, which highly overlaps with Hainan University's Physics Category enrollment majors, helping to attract high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of Henan Gaokao candidates is about 1.2 million (a significant increase from about 907,000 in 2025), leading to intensified competition. Hainan University is located in Haikou, Hainan Province, which is a cross-province application for Henan candidates, with a strong preference for southern coastal cities. The university has a large enrollment scale in Henan (500+ in Physics Category), making it one of the main sources of students outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+4.1%), the continuous significant rise in Soft Science ranking (144→87) enhancing attractiveness, and the substantial increase in the number of Henan candidates (about 1.2 million), the expansion has a backward-pushing effect on rankings, while the rise in university ranking and increase in candidates have a forward-pushing effect. The two factors offset each other, and competition is expected to slightly intensify. The predicted minimum ranking is about 57813, with a range of 57313–58313.
